points.text: Molecular Partners — MP0712 — Small Cell Lung Cancer — Phase 1/2a trial dosing ongoing in first cohort; initial data expected within months, comprehensive efficacy data anticipated in 2027.
Molecular Partners — MP0726 — Mesothelioma (MSLN-targeted) — First-in-human imaging for this bispecific Radio-DARPin candidate planned to start in H2 2026.
Molecular Partners — Pipeline Expansion — Bispecific Radio-DARPins — New target nomination planned for H2 2026 with two IND submissions scheduled for 2027.
Molecular Partners — Bispecific Radio-DARPins — Neuroendocrine Cancers — Showcased at Gordon Research Conference; platform demonstrated as isotope-agnostic vectors for alpha-emitting payloads.

VERAXA Biotech launched an AI-enabled drug discovery collaboration with Ardigen to optimize target pair selection for its BiTAC® pipeline of bispecific T cell engagers (TCEs) and bispecific antibody drug conjugates (ADCs).

VERAXA Biotech's BiTAC platform utilizes Boolean 'AND-gate' logic requiring co-expression of two distinct targets on cancer cells to activate bispecific TCEs and ADCs, aiming to widen the therapeutic window and reduce on-target, off-tumor toxicities.
Molecular Partners — MP0712 — Small Cell Lung Cancer — Phase 1/2a trial (NCT07278479) dosing ongoing; 5 centers open and recruiting; up to 4 dose levels and 4 doses per patient planned.
Molecular Partners — MP0712 — Small Cell Lung Cancer — Co-developed with Orano Med; utilizes 212 Pb-based DLL3-targeted bispecific Radio-DARPin mechanism.
Molecular Partners — DLL3 Radio-DARPin — Neuroendocrine Cancers — Nuclear Medicine Research Institute (South Africa) initiated compassionate care work using 225 Ac-loaded bispecific Radio-DARPin.

Molecular Partners — 225 Ac-loaded DLL3 Radio-DARPin — Small Cell Lung Cancer — Compassionate care program initiated by Nuclear Medicine Research Institute (NuMeRI) in South Africa under Section 21 framework.

VERAXA Biotech — BiTAC® Pipeline — Bispecific T cell engagers and bispecific ADCs — Initiated AI collaboration with Ardigen to guide selection of synergistic cancer target pairs for conditionally active TCEs and ADCs.

Veraxa Biotech — BiTAC® Pipeline — Bispecific T cell engagers and ADCs — Launched AI collaboration with Ardigen to refine dual-target combinations and rescue challenging targets via Boolean 'AND-gate' activation logic.
Molecular Partners — Bispecific Radio-DARPin commercialization — MP0712 (DLL3) + MP0726 (MSLN) pipeline — Phase 1/2a dosing active; strategic partnership with Orano Med; 2 INDs planned for 2027.

Molecular Partners — Bispecific Radio-DARPin clinical advancement — MP0712 (DLL3) + MP0726 (MSLN) pipeline — Phase 1/2a dosing ongoing; FIH imaging for MP0726 planned H2 2026; two INDs planned for 2027.

VERAXA Biotech — Next-generation antibody-based therapeutics development — BiTAC® bispecific T cell engagers and bispecific ADCs — Partnering with Ardigen to integrate AI for precision oncology target selection and validation.

Veraxa Biotech — Next-generation antibody-based therapeutics development — BiTAC® bispecific TCEs and ADCs — Partnering with Ardigen to integrate AI for precision oncology target selection and improved success rates.

MP0712 — Mechanism: Bispecific Radio-DARPin targeting DLL3 with 212 Pb payload — Phase: 1/2a — Population: Small cell lung cancer and neuroendocrine cancers — Comparator: None stated — Endpoints: Safety and efficacy data expected 2027.
MP0726 — Mechanism: Bispecific Radio-DARPin targeting MSLN — Phase: First-in-human imaging planned — Population: Not specified — Comparator: Not specified — Endpoints: Imaging data expected H2 2026.

DLL3-targeting Radio-DARPin — Mechanism: Bispecific vector with 225 Ac payload — Phase: Compassionate care (Section 21, South Africa) — Population: Neuroendocrine cancers — Comparator: Not specified — Status: Early-access program initiated by NuMeRI.

BiTAC® TCEs — Mechanism: Boolean 'AND-gate' logic requiring co-expression of two distinct targets on cancer cells for activation — Phase: Preclinical/Discovery — Population: Cancer cells with dual target expression — Comparator: Standard TCEs — Outcome: Potential to spare healthy tissues and reduce systemic toxicity by avoiding activation on single-target positive cells.

BiTAC® TCEs — Mechanism: Boolean 'AND-gate' logic requiring co-expression of two distinct cancer targets for activation — Phase: Preclinical/Discovery — Population: Cancer cells with dual target expression — Outcome: Potential to widen therapeutic window by sparing healthy tissues and reducing systemic toxicity.

Molecular Partners / Orano Med — Strategic partnership — MP0712 (DLL3-targeted bispecific Radio-DARPin) — Co-development agreement active; Orano Med providing 212 Pb isotope payload for Phase 1/2a trial.
Molecular Partners / Orano Med — Strategic partnership for MP0712 — DLL3-targeted Radio-DARPin — Co-development agreement active; Orano Med providing 212 Pb payload for Phase 1/2a trial.

VERAXA Biotech / Ardigen — AI-enabled drug discovery collaboration — BiTAC® bispecific pipeline — Partnership established to develop AI tools for optimizing cancer target pair selection for bispecific TCEs and ADCs.

Veraxa Biotech / Ardigen S.A. — AI-enabled drug discovery collaboration — BiTAC® bispecific pipeline — Partnership established to develop AI tools for synergistic cancer target pair selection; financial terms undisclosed.
